title: Health Canada and Fontem Ventures meeting: Notice of Intent – March 18, 2019 - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada and Fontem Ventures meeting: Notice of Intent – March 18, 2019
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 546 KB, 2 pages)
Call with Fontem Ventures regarding  the Notice of Intent – Vaping Advertising Restrictions
- Mathew Cook Acting Director, Tobacco Products Regulatory  Office, Tobacco Control Directorate (TCD) (Chair)
- Acting Director, Tobacco Products Regulatory  Office, Tobacco Control Directorate (TCD) (Chair)
- Acting Manager, Regulations Division, TCD

### Fontem Ventures (FV)
- Kelly Wood Senior Compliance Manager, FV
- Senior Compliance Manager, FV
A telephone call was held at the request of FV to discuss  the Notice of Intent (NOI) on Potential  Measures to Reduce the Impact of Vaping Products Advertising on Youth and  Non-users of Tobacco Products, that was published by HC on February 5,  2019.
The Chair opened the meeting by doing round table  introductions.
The Chair reminded participants that this meeting is  subject to disclosure as per HC’s Openness and  Transparency policies . In the interest of transparency, the department stated that it would be  making a record of the meeting publicly available. The handling of information and privacy notice was mentioned and acknowledged by  the representative from FV.
The representative  from FV wanted clarity on whether there was a preferred format and content for submissions  in response to the NOI. HC indicated that there is no specific format for the  response to the NOI. HC mentioned that it is useful if stakeholders:
- provide specific information to HC in  relation to a proposal;
- indicate when they support or do not support  a proposal;
- explain the reasons for support or opposition  to proposal and provide evidence, if available, to support their position.
The representative  from FV indicated that they intend to submit comments before the deadline of  March 22, 2019.
The meeting was then concluded.
- FV shared, prior to the meeting, a  draft of its preliminary comments on the NOI
